specific_question: What was the average duration Elexion dealers spent on vehicle orientation and safety system training during customer delivery in 2024, and how much time was dedicated to advanced driver assistance systems?
answer: In 2024, Elexion Automotive dealers spent an average of 45 minutes on vehicle orientation and safety system training during customer delivery, with only 10 minutes specifically dedicated to advanced driver assistance.
dr_question: What impact would a 20% increase in dealer-led customer education on EV infotainment and connectivity features have on reducing service visit frequency by 2027?
